# feat: add business owner auth, dashboard, and commission tracking

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.

**Commit**: `9a0876e40f7c` — feat: add business owner auth, dashboard, and commission tracking

**Body**:

Backend:
- BusinessOwner model with commission_rate, linked to Guide via owner_id
- /api/business/register, /api/business/login, /api/business/me
- /api/business/dashboard returns total_bookings, revenue, commission, guide stats
- /api/business/guides lists owned guides
- Commission captured at booking time (15% default)
- Added Render deployment config (render.yaml)

Flutter:
- BusinessAuthProvider for JWT-based business owner auth (mirrors tourist auth)
- BusinessLoginScreen with link from tourist login portal
- BusinessDashboardScreen showing bookings, revenue, commission, guide list
- Wired /business/login and /business/dashboard routes
- Added "Business owner? Sign in here" link on tourist login screen

Test credentials (seeded):
- Tourist: test@wanderless.com / wanderless123
- Guide: guide@wanderless.com / wanderless123
- Business: business@wanderless.com / wanderless123
